title: sideritis leucantha subsp. mohamedii
intro: Sideritis leucantha subsp. mohamedii, also known as the mountain tea or Turkish mountain tea, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Sideritis leucantha subsp. mohamedii include relief from anxiety and stress, improved cardiovascular health, and enhanced immune function. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas and infusions, as well as dried extracts, which are used to support overall well-being.
